title: Urbok
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=GFFA |image= |name=Urbok |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[36 ABY]], [[Murgo Choke]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of the ''[[Star Wars: The Dark Nest Trilogy]]'' to between [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]] and [[36 ABY]]. As ''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' is stated to take place a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the events of ''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'', the events of ''Dark Nest II'', which include Urbok's [[Death/Legends|death]] at the [[Murgo Choke]], must take place in 36 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]]. |species= |gender= |pronouns=She/her''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|—didn't Captain Urbok inform me the ''Ackbar''{{'s}} situation was this bad? Damage assessment is her responsibility.''"
"''B-because she's dead, s-sir?|Nek Bwua'tu and Yuul during the Battle of the Murgo Choke|audio=Bwuatu-Urbok.flac|}} '''Urbok''' was a [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] serving as part of the [[Engineer/Legends|engineering]] staff aboard the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']] during the [[Blockade of the Utegetu Nebula|blockade]] of the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]] by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] in [[36 ABY]]. She served under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]] of the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]], and was responsible for damage assessment during battles. When the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]], a secret nest of [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]], [[Battle of the Murgo Choke|attacked]] the Fifth Fleet at the [[Murgo Choke]], the ''Admiral Ackbar'' suffered heavy damage. Urbok and [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Reo]] were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Dark Nest [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] during the battle. [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] [[Yuul]], the only member of the engineering staff still capable of carrying out his duties, received a field promotion to Captain and took Urbok's former place. ==Behind the scenes== Urbok was mentioned in the [[2005]] novel ''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'', part of the ''[[Star Wars: The Dark Nest Trilogy|Dark Nest Trilogy]]'' written by [[Troy Denning]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1stm}} *[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen (abridged audiobook)|''Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Urbok }} [[Category:Engineers]] [[Category:Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet officers]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]]
